channel.title: flove making-of — onboarding questions
channel.description: New onboarding design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: Should flove apps have a consistent onboarding flow?
item.description:
• Standardized onboarding — All apps share a welcome/tour component. Consistent, more code. • Per-app onboarding — Each app designs its own. Flexible, potentially inconsistent. • No onboarding — Apps are self-explanatory. Simplest, assumes user familiarity. • Contextual hints — First-use tooltips and hints within the app. Non-disruptive, lightweight.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Contextual hints
